---
title: "FCMS"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
bibliography: ../REFERENCES.bib
link-citations: true
reference-section-title: References
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{FCMS}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview

```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  family = "fcms",
  pages = c(
    Overview = "index.html",
    Implementation = "fcms-implementation.html",
    Theory = "fcms-theory.html"
  )
)
```


These pages follow the finite-cylinder modal-series literature for straight circular cylinders near broadside [@Stanton_1988; @Stanton_1989_2].

```{r fcms_overview, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_overview(
  family = "fcms",
  summary = paste(
    "The finite cylinder modal series solution (`FCMS`) is the package's",
    "geometry-matched cylinder family for straight circular cylinders.",
    "It keeps the exact cylindrical-harmonic treatment of the cross-section",
    "and closes the finite-length problem with the standard near-broadside",
    "coherence factor."
  ),
  core_idea = paste(
    "Solve the circular cross-section exactly in cylindrical partial waves,",
    "then multiply by the finite-length directivity factor that accounts for",
    "the coherent addition along the cylinder axis."
  ),
  best_for = c(
    "Straight finite cylinders near broadside",
    "Rigid, pressure-release, liquid-filled, and gas-filled cylinder comparisons",
    "Reference checks for cylinder-like targets before using higher-level approximations"
  ),
  supports = c(
    "`Cylinder` shapes on `FLS` or `GAS` objects",
    "Near-broadside monostatic target strength",
    "Fluid and gas interiors parameterized relative to seawater as medium `1`"
  ),
  assumptions = c(
    "Circular cross-section and straight centerline",
    "Broadside or near-broadside incidence",
    "Homogeneous interior material properties for penetrable cases",
    "No elastic shear support in the interior"
  ),
  reading = c(
    "[Implementation](fcms-implementation.html): spectra, result extraction, and comparison tables",
    "[Theory](fcms-theory.html): cylindrical modal reduction, boundary conditions, and finite-length factorization"
  )
)
```
